offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate expense claims cause financial discrepancies. We provide an expense report generator instead of manual tracking of expenses and claims.
problem: Inaccurate expense claims leading to financial discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on expense tracking
DM outreach to freelancers with demo video
Participate in forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of expenses and claim flagging
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Enable CSV import for existing data
